{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tenman Shrine'''|天満神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].
